programme.title: Jungletown: Entertaining Jungle-Style
programme.desc: Jimmy shows off his jungle playground, but is challenged by interns worried about their environmental impact.

programme.title: I Was a Teenage Felon: High AF
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Fred traffics thousands of pounds of marijuana across the border between the United States and Mexico.

programme.title: The Devil You Know
programme.sub-title: There's a Satanist in the Suburbs
programme.desc: A man disappears amidst rumors of a local Satanic killer Journalist Chad Nance takes up the case as police come up empty-handed.

programme.title: The Devil You Know
programme.sub-title: A Punk Knows Where the Bodies Are Buried
programme.desc: Chad Nance investigates the background of a mentally-ill killer a punk rocker war veteran is forced to make a gut-wrenching decision.
